tags.name: `mc-tab-bar`
tags.description:
Purpose: A tabbed interface that allows users to navigate between different views or sections of content within the same page.
Category: Content Display, Navigation, Layout
When to use: When you need to display multiple views or sections of content in a compact space.
When not to use: For single-view interfaces or when a simple dropdown menu suffices.
Works with components: mc-tab
Alternative component names: Tabbed Navigation, Tabbed Interface, Tab Control, Tab Panel, Tab View

Events:

  * `tabchange` {`CustomEvent<number>`} - Emitted when the any of the tabs is selected.

Slots:

  * ``tab`` {} - The mc-tab element to use as a tab.

  * ``panel`` {} - The panel HTML to use for the corresponding mc-tab.

Attributes:

  * `currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item.
Index starts from `0`.

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the tab bar.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tab bar.

Properties:

  * `instanceCounter` {`number`} - 

  * `instanceId` {`string`} - 

  * `transitionType` {`"smooth" | "none"`} - 

  * `currentFocusIndex` {`number`} - 

  * `tabs` {`McTab[] | undefined`} - 

  * `panels` {`Element[] | undefined`} - 

  * `tabsBox` {`HTMLDivElement | undefined`} - 

  * `tabsHost` {`HTMLDivElement | undefined`} - 

  * `scrollButtonRight` {`HTMLButtonElement | undefined`} - 

  * `scrollButtonLeft` {`HTMLButtonElement | undefined`} - 

  * `renderScrollButtons` {`boolean`} - 

  * `tabsClientWidth` {`number`} - 

  * `tabsScrollWidth` {`number`} - 

  * `currentScrollPosition` {`number`} - 

  * `tabObserver` {`IntersectionObserver | undefined`} - 

  * `tabObserverEnabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item.
Index starts from `0`.

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the tab bar.

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tab bar.

  * `tabchange` - Change of selected mc-tab.

attributes.name: currentindex
attributes.description:
`currentindex` {`number`} - The index number of the current `active` item.
Index starts from `0`.

Property: currentindex

Default: 0

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
`variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the tab bar.

Property: variant

Default: default

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the tab bar.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: ontabchange
attributes.description: `tabchange` {`CustomEvent<number>`} - Emitted when the any of the tabs is selected.
